eightgine_add_module(MODULE_NAME "cJSON"
    MODULE_SOURCES_DIR "${EIGHTGINE_THIRD_PARTY_DIR}/cJSON/src"
    MODULE_INCLUDE_DIR "${EIGHTGINE_THIRD_PARTY_DIR}/cJSON/include" "${EIGHTGINE_THIRD_PARTY_DIR}/cJSON/include/cJSON"
    # MODULE_PRIVATE_DEFINITIONS CJSON_EXPORT_SYMBOLS
    # MODULE_INTERFACE_DEFINITIONS CJSON_IMPORT_SYMBOLS
    MODULE_PRIVATE_DEFINITIONS CJSON_HIDE_SYMBOLS
    MODULE_TYPE STATIC
)

#     MODULE_INCLUDE_DIR "${EIGHTGINE_THIRD_PARTY_DIR}/cJSON/include" "${EIGHTGINE_THIRD_PARTY_DIR}/cJSON/include/cJSON"

#     MODULE_INTERFACE_DEFINITIONS CJSON_IMPORT_SYMBOLS

# )
